scope: Files, accounts, permissions, path traversal, privilege escalation

findings.title: Incomplete path traversal validation in File.isValid(path:)
Download handler does not normalize path or resolve symlinks — path traversal via symlink
Symlink attack: no symlink resolution on delete, createDirectory, and other filesystem mutators
Missing root-path jail check after path normalization and symlink resolution
Force unwrap of client.user! in FilesController without guard — potential crash from unauthenticated request
Privilege escalation: edit_users allows setting arbitrary privileges including admin privileges
Password hashes leaked in account listing response
SQL injection in readSchema via unsanitized table name
Force unwrap crash in FilePrivilege init parsing permissions file
Directories created with overly permissive POSIX permissions (0o777)
Download file handler does not check dropbox permissions using normalized/resolved paths
Recursive directory listing without depth limit can exhaust server resources
Root directory '/' deletion not protected — user can delete entire file tree
No rate limiting on login attempts — brute force attack possible
Search results bypass dropbox read permission checks
TOCTOU race between path validation and filesystem operations
No limit on directory subscription count per client
